goals.lastAssistantText:
Implemented more of `TODO.md` in `examples/add.py`:

- Added local MMIO, file I/O, bump/free-list allocators, GPU buffer, address-space, and minimal GPU memory manager.
- Added local GSP RPC wire formats and packet builder/checksum/send/response helpers.
- Added standalone chip probe and metadata shell, with no top-level tinygrad import.
- Added a real Linux ioctl transport shell with request-code encoding and raw `/dev/nvidia*` / `/dev/nvidia-uvm` openings.
- Kept validation green with `py_compile` and isolated smoke tests.

What remains for “all”:
- Real RM alloc/control payload integration on Linux.
- GSP boot, firmware prep, and RPC client wiring into the backend shell.
- Channel/GPFIFO and page-table wiring for actual end-to-end execution.
- Replacing the transitional tinygrad-backed transport path.

goals.lastAssistantText:
Continued the remaining Milestone 7 work and updated `TODO.md`.

- Fixed Falcon FBIF register offsets/encoding in `examples/add.py:511`: local code now matches tinygrad `dev_fbif_v4`.
- Fixed boot firmware image placement: SEC2/GSP firmware images now allocate normal VRAM and pass VRAM offsets to Falcon DMA, while WPR metadata keeps BAR1/sysmem addresses.
- Added local Ampere/Ada FWSEC/FRTS prep: VBIOS read, BIT Falcon table parse, FWSEC image patching, FRTS command packing, and pre-SEC2 GSP Falcon execution.
- Added/updated selftests for FBIF programming, boot VRAM allocation, LibOS mailbox target, and DMA source selection.
- Updated `TODO.md:42` with current verified progress and the new exact hardware blocker.

Validation:
- `python3 -m py_compile examples/add.py examples/mul.py` passes.
- `python3 examples/add.py --selftest` passes.
- Booted eGPU now reaches GSP Falcon FWSEC/FRTS DMA and fails at: `Falcon DMA queue is full at base=0x110000, DMATRFCMD=0x615`.

Current progress: firmware download/load, LibOS args, FRTS prep, and boot image placement are now local and validated. Remaining blocker is Falcon DMA execution before `GSP_INIT_DONE`.

goals.lastStatus: max duration reached (900s); requested final handoff.
goals.lastAssistantText:
## Objective
- Make `examples_kepler/add.py` drive a real `out[i]=a[i]+b[i]` compute kernel on a GTX 770 (GK104, sm_30) eGPU over USB4 via TinyGPU, per `examples_kepler/plan.md`.
- Active goal (agents.md): ask each ref repo on DeepWiki to understand the current blocker, then continue debug/test/fix to make `add.py` work on the eGPU.

## Important Details
- Target: GTX 770, Kepler GK104 sm_30, eGPU over USB4, macOS, TinyGPU DriverKit dext. Plan: `examples_kepler/plan.md`. TinyGPU dext IS loaded; hardware reachable.
- DeepWiki facts (envytools, allbilly/linux_drm nouveau, TheTom/pascal-egpu, xiuxiazhang/KeplerAs):
  - `0xbad0daXX` sentinel = engine disabled/clock-gated; `0xbadf3000` = power-gated falcon (GPC/ROP un-gated).
  - GK104 `PMC_ENABLE`: full `0xffffffff` required to exit power-gating.
  - FALCON v1 load: `CODE_INDEX=0x180`/`DATA_INDEX=0x1c0` = `start|(1<<24)` WRITE only; CODE data `0x184`, CODE TAG `0x188` every 64 words; DATA `0x1c4`; bootvec `0x104`; CPUCTL `0x100` START=`0x2`. FECS base `0x409000`, GPCCS `0x41a000`, GPC falcon `0x502000+gpc*0x8000`.
  - `nvkm_mc_unk260` = write `0x260` (0 during load, 1 to release).
  - FECS start seq (`gf100_gr_init_ctxctl_int`): load FECS+GPCCS, gate 0x260=0 then 1, load csdata packs via `0x1c0`/`0x1c4`, then `0x40910c=0`, `0x409100=0x2`; wait `0x409800 & 0x80000000`; size `0x409804`.
  - **csdata packs** (from `ctxgk104.c` `gk104_grctx`): hub=`gk104_grctx_pack_hub` (falcon 0x409000, starstar 0, base 0), gpc_0=`gk104_grctx_pack_gpc_0` (0x41a000,0,0x418000), gpc_1=`gk104_grctx_pack_gpc_1` (0x41a000,0,0x418000), tpc=`gk104_grctx_pack_tpc` (0x41a000,4,0x419800), ppc=`gk104_grctx_pack_ppc` (0x41a000,8,0x41be00). csdata method stream = `(xfer<<26|addr)` words; values come from FUC data file already in DMEM.
  - **GPC power-gating** released by `gk104_pmu_pgob(pmu, enable=false)` (`nvkm/subdev/pmu/gk104.c:57`): core un-gate = `nvkm_mask(0x020004, 0xc0000000, 0x40000000)` (bit30=1), plus `0x000200` GR-reset toggle (bit12 clear then set) and `0x10a78c` PMU handshake; fuse `0x31c` bit0 must be set (true on GK104). Runs in `gf100_gr_oneinit` BEFORE topology read at `0x409604`.
- Linux nouveau source at `ref/linux/drivers/gpu/drm/nouveau/nvkm/` (engine/gr/*, subdev/pmu/gk104.c).
- GK104 FUC firmware at `firmware/gk104/`: gk104_fecs_code.bin (3072B), gk104_fecs_data.bin (772B), gk104_gpccs_code.bin (1792B), gk104_gpccs_data.bin (108B). VERIFIED correct (regenerated from hubgk104.fuc3.h/gpcgk104.fuc3.h — sizes match existing bins).
- `--probe` reads `PMC_BOOT_0=0x0e4040a2` → chip_id=228=0x0e4=GK104 confirmed.
- BE FALCON read artifact resolved: `imem[0]` LE readback now `0xf50e9b03` (EXACT match) — firmware loaded correctly.
- `falcon_ready` reads `base+0x800` (0x409800) bit31 — must NOT trust sentinel `0xbad0da1f`/`0xbadf3000` bit31.

## Work State
### Completed
- Transport rewritten to match `examples/add.py` (`<BQQ`, `MAP_SYSMEM_FD`+`recvmsg`+`mmap`, no write response).
- `alloc_sysmem` returns `(memoryview, paddrs)`; coherent mmap.
- Software backend demo + `--middle-selftest` green (`launch_words=26`, `software_demo=ok N=256`).
- `--probe` prints `PMC_BOOT_0=0x0e4040a2` (real GK104).
- Firmware extracted + VERIFIED: regenerated from fuc3.h, sizes match existing bins (no bug).
- `falcon_load` matches nouveau falcon_v1 (WRITE=bit24, ITAG every 64 words, 0x40-word pad, raw).
- Added `nvkm_mask` + `gk104_pmu_pgob` helpers (GPC un-gate MMIO) to add.py.
- Added `--probe-falcon` with real FECS diagnostics (CPUCTL/VER/mailboxes/0x409604/0x502100/0x41a100/ISR 0x409c18).
- Fixed `PMC_ENABLE=0xffffffff` → FECS registers accessible (`VER=0x81103`).
- Created `grctx_gk104.py`: parses `gf100_gr_init`/`gf100_gr_pack` from all engine/gr/*.c, resolves 5 csdata packs → flat `(addr,count,pitch)` lists + `method_stream()` replicating `gf100_gr_init_csdata`. Output: hub 87 entries→50 words, gpc_0 26→16, gpc_1 17→11, tpc 35→19, ppc 13→6.
- Implemented `falcon_csdata_write` (0x1c0/0x1c4 method stream) in add.py and CALLED it in `_init_hardware` for all 5 packs BEFORE falcon_start.
- Re-tested `--probe-falcon`: FECS now runs (`CPUCTL=0x10`, `imem[0]=0xf50e9b03` EXACT match) — csdata consumed, but NOT ready.
- Diagnosed: `0x409604=0x0` (GPC count 0), `0x502100`/`0x41a100`=`0xbadf3000` → GPCs power-gated. Subagent confirmed un-gate via `gk104_pmu_pgob` (0x020004 bit30).
- Created `examples_kepler/progress.md` (accurate milestone + blocker log).

### Active
- GPCs power-gated: `0x409604=0x0`, GPC0 falcon `0x502100`/`0x41a100`=`0xbadf3000`. Need to call `gk104_pmu_pgob` (write `0x020004` mask `0xc0000000` val `0x40000000`) in `_init_hardware` BEFORE FECS start, then re-test FECS ready + `0x409804` size.
- `nvkm_mask`/`gk104_pmu_pgob` helpers ARE defined in add.py but NOT YET called from `_init_hardware`.

### Blocked
- GR golden-context generation (`gk104_grctx_generate_*` topology funcs: bundle/pagepool/attrib/gpc_tpc_nr/sm_id/etc.) — not yet ported; needed after FECS ready.
- FIFO/RAMIN/USERD/GPFIFO channel + runlist submit — not implemented (code review C4-C6, C11).
- Real `nvcc -arch=sm_30` cubin + `.nv.info` parsing (review C8-C10) — Docker absent in sandbox.
- GMMU page-table target apertures: lower PDEs use VRAM/PHYS target not SYS (review C1); PTE_FRAME mask width (C2); VM flush after mapping (H6).
- cubin ELF uploaded as raw code (C8), placeholder SASS guard (C9).

## Next Move
1. Insert `gk104_pmu_pgob(self)` call into `_init_hardware` (after `PMC_ENABLE=0xffffffff`, before loading falcons / csdata / start — subagent says before topology read; safest immediately after PMC_ENABLE). Re-run `--probe-falcon`; expect `0x409604` ≠ 0 and FECS ready (`0x409800` bit31) + valid `0x409804`.
2. Once FECS posts ready, allocate GR golden-context buffer (size `0x409804`), port `gk104_grctx_generate_*` to fill it.
3. Then FIFO/GPFIFO channel + `submit_launch` end-to-end (fix review C4-C7); run `out[i]=a[i]+b[i]` on silicon.

## Relevant Files
- `/Users/yeren/Desktop/nvgpu/examples_kepler/add.py` — primary target (~1595+ lines; transport, GMMU, CWD/launch, NVDevice, FALCON loader, `nvkm_mask`/`gk104_pmu_pgob`/`falcon_csdata_write` added).
- `/Users/yeren/Desktop/nvgpu/examples/add.py` — WORKING transport reference.
- `/Users/yeren/Desktop/nvgpu/examples_kepler/plan.md` — bring-up plan + §24 register record.
- `/Users/yeren/Desktop/nvgpu/examples_kepler/progress.md` — milestone + blocker log (kept accurate).
- `/Users/yeren/Desktop/nvgpu/examples_kepler/grctx_gk104.py` — NEW: csdata pack parser + `method_stream()` (verified 5 packs).
- `/Users/yeren/Desktop/nvgpu/examples_kepler/kepler_gk104_code_review.md` — NEW: full code review (C1-C11, H1-H9, M1-M12); still-valid open issues: C1 GMMU PDE target, C2 PTE_FRAME, C4 GPFIFO conflation, C5 GP_PUT, C6 channel/RAMFC/runlist, C7 zero GR ctx, C8 cubin ELF, C9 placeholder SASS, C10 ABI, C11 sema deadlock, H6 VM flush, H8 fw truncation, M9 backend validation.
- `/Users/yeren/Desktop/nvgpu/firmware/gk104/` — FECS/GPCCS/PMU bins + fuc3.h sources.
- `/Users/yeren/Desktop/nvgpu/ref/linux/drivers/gpu/drm/nouveau/nvkm/engine/gr/{gf100.c,ctxgk104.c,gf100.h}` — csdata/grctx port source.
- `/Users/yeren/Desktop/nvgpu/ref/linux/drivers/gpu/drm/nouveau/nvkm/subdev/pmu/gk104.c` — `gk104_pmu_pgob` (line 57) GPC un-gate source.
- DeepWiki refs: `envytools/envytools`, `allbilly/linux_drm`, `TheTom/pascal-egpu`, `xiuxiazhang/KeplerAs`.
